name: persistent-agent
title: Persistent Agent
description: An addressable chat resource that persists conversation state in Postgres and reconnects in-flight streams through Redis.
docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the persistent chat pages, route-backed streaming APIs, visitor cookie contract, in-memory chat storage by default, optional Postgres-backed chat storage, optional Redis resumable stream support, and the AI Gateway env vars required for the browser happy path.
